def positive_django_update_single_in_loop():
    rule_id = "django_update_single_in_loop"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Django code updates one row at a time inside loops instead of using bulk or set-based updates."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
